raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The closure of several women’s health providers in California will have detrimental impacts on residents.",
    "Planned Parenthood Mar Monte is the largest Planned Parenthood affiliate in the country.",
    "One in four Californians has counted on Planned Parenthood to provide cancer and wellness screenings, family planning and birth control, behavioral health, and STI testing.",
    "Over $300 million has been cut from Medi-Cal, which annually funds over a million patient visits.",
    "The Trump administration's H.R. 1 stripped all Planned Parenthood health centers of federal Medicaid reimbursements, cutting more than $305 million in funding from California alone.",
    "Current federal law does not allow federal reimbursement for abortion services.",
    "Planned Parenthood health centers in California account for 1.3 million patient visits each year, representing one-third of all Planned Parenthood patients nationwide.",
    "Planned Parenthood is the largest provider of reproductive and preventive health care in California’s Medi-Cal and Family PACT programs."

}
```
